subcodes.first_line: This is the Book sent down by He Who fashioneth the heavens unto him who hath turned towards Him. Verily, He is the All-Hearing, the Answerer. Hearken unto the Call from the precincts of 'Akká [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله فاطر السماء لمن اقبل الیه انه هو السامع المجیب اسمع الندآء من شطر عکاء
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @prayer for forgiveness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
